text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I told you it was a fearsome opponent, despite
the cuteness of the plushies.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No! I know this situation all too well. Trust me,
the road you're trying to go down is a one-way
ticket to rock bottom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All that happens is your money flies off and your
roommate gets angry... It's not good at all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But! The day will come when you can don your
mask again. Believe in that day and exit the ring
for now.
